title: Encumbered (Player Weight)
description: A configurable weight mod that lets you add weight to every item in the game. No more carrying the universe in your pocket.
body:
### Overview
--- 
This mod lets you add weight to items. The more items you carry, the more you weigh.
![Inventory User Interface](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/058bec1001f429f47c73a5eafe8193b926b036af.png)
![Weight Tooltip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a9df3248d50e939a4c7e14098f9e8d59215ec99.png)
### How It Works
--- 
There are three stages of encumberment:

Unencumbered: You can move normally.
![Hotbar Weight Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a225794aae0a120926c25bc7c942f51ed3c8720.png)    

Encumbered: You can no longer sprint.
![Encumbered Hotbar Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e1f18bba972bc35d5fba092144769c6074dce2e.png)   

Over Encumbered: You can barely move (no sprinting, jumping, slower movement, and sinking in fluids).
![Over Encumbered Hotbar Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25210cfd643edca84b5cc540695ac13c51f69f87.png)    

### Features
--- 
- 🔧 Configurable weights, encumberment thresholds, and UI.
- 🎒 Support for shulker boxes and some backpack mods (Sophisticated Backpacks).
- 🐎 Riding entities takes into account your weight
- ✈️ Elytra considers weight
- 🖥️ User-friendly GUI with a helpful weight indicator icon.
- 🌍 Multiplayer support!
  
### Planned Features
--- 
- 🔄 Further mod support (Curios Slot, Backpacks, etc.).
- Version back/forward porting (1.20.x and above. Others upon request to popular versions)
--- 
More updates to come! Questions? Check us out on [Discord](https://discord.gg/B7FzPb7kJU) 🎮

<details>
<summary>Mod Setup</summary>
In order to modify weight values, you must create a datapack to override or add your own mod's weight values. The datapack should be dropped in the world's datapacks folder.
  
  
  Datapack Example:
  ```
  -DataPackName
  |-pack.mcmeta
  |-data
   |-encumbered
    |-data_maps
     |-item
      |-item_weights.json
  ```
  
  item_weights.json should be in the format:
  ```json
  {
    "values": {
      "minecraft:stone": {
        "replace": true,
        "value": {
          "weight": 12.0
        }
      },
      "modid:item": {
        "replace": true,
        "value": {
          "weight": 1.0
        }
      },
      "#minecraft:logs": {
        "replace": true,
        "value": {
          "weight": 10.0
        }
      }
  }
  ```
  
  The pack.mcmeta file should look like this:
  ```json
  {
      "pack": {
          "pack_format": 34,
          "description": "Pack Description Here"
      }
  }
  ```
  
###   Configs
--- 
  Config/encumbered-client.toml:
  - Contains configs that are independent of the server. Each player can modify these values at will on their client
  - Config/encumbered-server.toml: Contains configs that are consistent across all players. Anything changed here will change for all players.


</details>
